attacking_style: Explosive power on steep, punchy cobbled climbs (like Molenberg), capable of dropping entire groups. Equally effective in positioning for sprint finishes from large breakaways or reduced groups.
team_tactics: Dual-role rider: executes leadouts for designated sprinters (Pedersen) when needed, but given freedom in classics. Trek uses him to infiltrate large breakaway moves in stage races, banking on his finishing power.
terrain_preference: Steep cobbled bergs and punchy classics terrain where pure power dominates. Thrives in reduced bunch sprints or breakaway finishes. Less suited to pure flat sprints where positioning is crucial.
vulnerability: Forced to lead out sprints from front creates positional disadvantage, though compensated by raw power. Relies heavily on explosive strength rather than tactical finesse in finale positioning.
key_patterns: Strongest on steep cobbled sections, capable of dropping entire breakaway groups solo
Effective infiltrator in large breakaway moves, consistently finishing high from reduced groups
Team-first mentality: switches between personal ambition and leadout duties based on team needs
Overcomes poor sprint positioning through pure power rather than tactical craft
form_trajectory: neutral: Limited recent data (2022), but showed tactical maturity in team role. Earlier performances (2020-2021) demonstrated consistent strength in classics and stage race breakaways.
